title: solanum nigrum subsp. luteovirescens
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. luteovirescens, also known as Black Nightshade or Yellow-green Nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. luteovirescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and flu.
